metadata.description: Skills for building, validating, and analyzing CARTO geospatial workflows.

plugins.name: build-carto-workflow
plugins.description: Write, validate, and upload CARTO Workflows. Includes provider guides (BigQuery, Snowflake, Databricks) and troubleshooting.

plugins.name: carto-cli
plugins.description: Use the CARTO CLI to interact with the platform: auth, connections, imports, SQL, workflows, install.

plugins.name: find-tables
plugins.description: Discover available tables in a CARTO connection via the CLI.

plugins.name: render-workflow-diagram
plugins.description: Render a CARTO Workflow JSON as a Unicode box-art DAG diagram in the terminal.

plugins.name: enriching-local-api-info
plugins.description: Enrich component notes and input-type documentation served by the local workflows-api.

plugins.name: session-wrapup
plugins.description: Gather session learnings to feed back into agent and skill refinements.

plugins.name: hotspot-analysis
plugins.description: Build Getis-Ord Gi* hotspot and coldspot detection workflows for points or grids, including spacetime variants.

plugins.name: spatial-enrichment
plugins.description: Add demographics, sociodemographic features, and 'what's around' enrichment to points, grids, or trade areas.

plugins.name: geocoding
plugins.description: Convert street addresses or place names to geographic coordinates in CARTO.

plugins.name: ml-pipelines
plugins.description: Build ML pipelines (classification, regression, forecasting) on BigQuery ML and Snowflake ML inside CARTO Workflows.

plugins.name: composite-scoring
plugins.description: Build composite-score workflows: weighted scores, indexes, PCA, supervised/unsupervised ranking.

plugins.name: trade-area-analysis
plugins.description: Trade area / catchment analysis: isochrones, site scoring, location ranking for retail, OOH, and services.

plugins.name: site-selection
plugins.description: Site selection and cannibalization analysis: candidate scoring, twin/look-alike areas, network impact.

plugins.name: territory-planning
plugins.description: Territory balancing and location allocation: divide areas into balanced regions or place facilities optimally.

plugins.name: routing-od-analysis
plugins.description: Routing and origin-destination analysis: routes, isolines, OD matrices, mobility patterns.

plugins.name: spatial-autocorrelation
plugins.description: Moran's I / LISA workflows to detect spatial clustering, dispersion, and HH/HL/LH/LL outliers.

plugins.name: geographically-weighted-regression
plugins.description: Geographically Weighted Regression (GWR): per-cell coefficients revealing how predictor importance varies across space.

plugins.name: map-visualization
plugins.description: Tips for visualizing analysis results on a CARTO map.
